description.html: Returns how many items are in an array, useful for loops or checking if the array is empty.
description.text: Returns how many items are in an array, useful for loops or checking if the array is empty.

description.html: Returns a new array that is this array joined with other array(s) and/or value(s).
description.text: Returns a new array that is this array joined with other array(s) and/or value(s).

description.html: Copies a sequence of array elements within the array.
description.text: Copies a sequence of array elements within the array.

description.html: Returns a new Array Iterator object that contains the key/value pairs for each index in the array.
description.text: Returns a new Array Iterator object that contains the key/value pairs for each index in the array.

description.html: Tests whether all elements in the array meet a condition defined by a function you pass into it, returning true if they do.
description.text: Tests whether all elements in the array meet a condition defined by a function you pass into it, returning true if they do.

description.html: Fills all the elements of an array from a start index to an end index with a static value.
description.text: Fills all the elements of an array from a start index to an end index with a static value.

description.html: Creates a new array containing only the items from the original array that pass a test you specify in the function you pass into it.
description.text: Creates a new array containing only the items from the original array that pass a test you specify in the function you pass into it.

description.html: Returns the found item in the array, if some element in the array satisfies the testing function you pass into it, or returns undefined if not found.
description.text: Returns the found item in the array, if some element in the array satisfies the testing function you pass into it, or returns undefined if not found.

description.html: Returns the found index in the array, if an element in the array satisfies the testing function, or -1 if not found.
description.text: Returns the found index in the array, if an element in the array satisfies the testing function, or -1 if not found.

description.html: Runs the function you pass it once for every item in an array, passing into that function each item in the array as well as its index value. Functionally similar, but syntactically different, from creating a for loop for iterating over an array
description.text: Runs the function you pass it once for every item in an array, passing into that function each item in the array as well as its index value. Functionally similar, but syntactically different, from creating a for loop for iterating over an array.

description.html: Checks if an array contains a specific value, returning true if found or false if not.
description.text: Checks if an array contains a specific value, returning true if found or false if not.

description.html: Searches an array for a specific value and tells you where it first appears by returning that index value, or -1 if it's not there at all.
description.text: Searches an array for a specific value and tells you where it first appears by returning that index value, or -1 if it's not there at all.

description.html: Combines all items in an array into a single string, placing an optional separator you pass it (like a comma or space) between each item. It's the opposite of a string's split() method.
description.text: Combines all items in an array into a single string, placing an optional separator you pass it (like a comma or space) between each item. It's the opposite of a string's split() method.

description.html: Returns a new Array Iterator that contains the keys for each index in the array.
description.text: Returns a new Array Iterator that contains the keys for each index in the array.

description.html: Returns the last (greatest) index of an element within the array equal to an element, or -1 if none is found.
description.text: Returns the last (greatest) index of an element within the array equal to an element, or -1 if none is found.

description.html: Transforms each element in an array using a function you provide, returning a brand new array with all the transformed values.
description.text: Transforms each element in an array using a function you provide, returning a brand new array with all the transformed values.

description.html: Removes the last element from an array and returns that element.
description.text: Removes the last element from an array and returns that element.

description.html: Adds one or more elements to the end of an array, and returns the new length of the array.
description.text: Adds one or more elements to the end of an array, and returns the new length of the array.

description.html: Combines all items in an array into a single value by running a function on each item, great for totaling numbers or building a result step by step.
description.text: Combines all items in an array into a single value by running a function on each item, great for totaling numbers or building a result step by step.

description.html: Apply a funciton against an accumulator> and each value of the array (from right-to-left) as to reduce it to a single value.
description.text: Apply a funciton against an accumulator> and each value of the array (from right-to-left) as to reduce it to a single value.

description.html: Reverses the order of the elements of an array in place. (First becomes the last, last becomes first.)
description.text: Reverses the order of the elements of an array in place. (First becomes the last, last becomes first.)

description.html: Removes the first element from an array and returns that element.
description.text: Removes the first element from an array and returns that element.

description.html: Copies out a portion of an array (from a start index to an end index) and gives you a new array with just those items, leaving the original unchanged.
description.text: Copies out a portion of an array (from a start index to an end index) and gives you a new array with just those items, leaving the original unchanged.

description.html: Checks if at least one item in an array passes a test you define and pass it as a function, returning true or false.
description.text: Checks if at least one item in an array passes a test you define and pass it as a function, returning true or false.

description.html: Rearranges the items in an array into a new order (alphabetically by default) and changes the original array.
description.text: Rearranges the items in an array into a new order (alphabetically by default) and changes the original array.

description.html: Changes an array by removing, replacing, or adding items at a specific spot.
description.text: Changes an array by removing, replacing, or adding items at a specific spot.

description.html: Returns a localized string representing the array and its elements. Overrides the Object.prototype.toLocaleString() method.
description.text: Returns a localized string representing the array and its elements. Overrides the Object.prototype.toLocaleString() method.

description.html: Returns a string representing the array and its elements. Overrides the Object.prototype.toString() method.
description.text: Returns a string representing the array and its elements. Overrides the Object.prototype.toString() method.

description.html: Adds one or more elements to the front of an array, and returns the new length of the array.
description.text: Adds one or more elements to the front of an array, and returns the new length of the array.

description.html: Returns a new Array Iterator object that contains the values for each index in the array.
description.text: Returns a new Array Iterator object that contains the values for each index in the array.
